room.caption: [Vault21] I don't know what my favorite level from DT1 is, but I do know my least favorite is 'Windy Slopes' and 'Distortion 3'. I'd love to nuke those.

instance.creationCode: GID_SET(258264, self.id) moveSpeedX=4 moveSpeedY=0 bMoving=0 drawType=1 platColor=make_color_rgb(170,170,255) sprite_index=sScaledCollision image_xscale=128 image_yscale=16
